mapper.select: select count(1) from practice_paper_questions where paper_id = #{paperId} and deleted = false

select id, paper_id, sort_no, question_id, bank_id, chapter_name, template_code, version_group_id, version_no, version_remark, source_action, source_question_id, source_version_no, title, question_type, difficulty, status, answer_text, analysis_text, option_json, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted from practice_paper_questions where paper_id = #{paperId} and deleted = false order by sort_no asc, id asc
mapper.insert:
insert into practice_paper_questions ( paper_id, sort_no, question_id, bank_id, chapter_name, template_code, version_group_id, version_no, version_remark, source_action, source_question_id, source_version_no, title, question_type, difficulty, status, answer_text, analysis_text, option_json, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) values
(#{paperId}, #{item.sortNo}, #{item.questionId}, #{item.bankId}, #{item.chapterName}, #{item.templateCode}, #{item.versionGroupId}, #{item.versionNo}, #{item.versionRemark}, #{item.sourceAction}, #{item.sourceQuestionId}, #{item.sourceVersionNo}, #{item.title}, #{item.questionType}, #{item.difficulty}, #{item.status}, #{item.answerText}, #{item.analysisText}, #{item.optionJson}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt}, #{item.createdBy}, #{item.updatedBy}, #{item.deleted})
